ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Helga Sinclair - Tough as Nails.' Lorcana card databases confirm this is the Helga Sinclair from Atlantis: The Lost Empire. The version subtitle 'Tough as Nails' is consistent with her canonical characterization as a skilled mercenary and Rourke's second-in-command. Prior Lorcana versions confirm the franchise's presence (Helga Sinclair - Femme Fatale and Right-Hand Woman in Into the Inklands; Vengeful Partner also in that set). Identity confirmed via card name + Lorcana databases + Disney source-material wiki.

trivia_bullets.text: Helga Sinclair - Tough as Nails is card 183/204 in Archazia's Island (set 7, March 7, 2025). This is Helga's fourth Lorcana card; prior prints include Helga Sinclair - Femme Fatale (Into the Inklands, Super Rare Emerald), Helga Sinclair - Right-Hand Woman (Into the Inklands, 175/204), and Helga Sinclair - Vengeful Partner (Into the Inklands). Making her one of the more heavily represented Atlantis characters in the game. [Lorcana Player: Helga Sinclair cards, via WebSearch; Mushure Report news, via WebSearch]
sources: Lorcana Player: Helga Sinclair cards, via WebSearch
Mushu Report: Helga Sinclair - Vengeful Partner and Femme Fatale, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: The card is classified as a 2-cost Steel Uncommon, with Challenger +3 and the QUICK REFLEXES ability: during your turn this character gains Evasive, allowing her to challenge characters with Evasive. This mechanically mirrors Helga's canonical combat role in Atlantis: The Lost Empire (2001) — she is Rourke's second-in-command, described in the film as skilled in martial arts, military tactics, and leadership; the oldest of six siblings who 'grew up fighting with her fists as well as her wits.' [card frontmatter (oracle_text); Disney Wiki: Helga Sinclair, via WebSearch]
sources: Disney Wiki: Helga Sinclair, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: In Atlantis: The Lost Empire (2001), Helga Katrina Sinclair serves as Lieutenant and second-in-command to Commander Rourke on the expedition to find Atlantis. Voiced by Claudia Christian, she is a professional mercenary motivated by power and wealth — and is ultimately betrayed by Rourke himself, who uses her as a ballast sacrifice. Her arc is one of the darker subversions in a Disney film: loyal lieutenant to an employer who treats her as expendable. [Disney Wiki: Helga Sinclair, via WebSearch; IMDB: Atlantis: The Lost Empire, via WebSearch]
sources: Disney Wiki: Helga Sinclair, via WebSearch
IMDB: Atlantis: The Lost Empire, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: Illustrator credit is Samoldstoree. This card has no flavor text. The version subtitle 'Tough as Nails' is the Ravensburger-curated character beat for this print — a direct nod to her canonical description as physically and mentally formidable. The contrast with her 'Femme Fatale' Super Rare version (the Into the Inklands high-rarity print) suggests Ravensburger is using the version subtitle to segment her characterization across prints: the common/uncommon prints emphasize combat toughness; the rare print emphasizes her strategic and seductive intelligence. [Lorcana Player: Helga Sinclair cards, via WebSearch]
sources: Lorcana Player: Helga Sinclair cards, via WebSearch
